subcodes.first_line: A questioner hath asked: "Hath the Resurrection come to pass?" Say: "Yea, by My Soul, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise!" "Hath the Hour arrived?" Say: "Indeed it hath!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قال قائل هل القیامه قامت قل ای و نفسی العلیم الحکیم و هل الساعه اتت قل بلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
